title: Restaurant Management Reimagined
subtitle: Optimize your bookings, coordinate your team, and deliver an exceptional guest experience with Tablely.
heroPill: Tablely: The all-in-one platform for modern restaurateurs
featuresHeading: Everything you need to run your establishment
featuresSubtitle: A powerful suite of tools designed to simplify your daily operations and boost profitability.
feature1Description: A seamless booking engine for your guests, integrated directly with your floor plan.
feature2Description: Visualize your dining room in real-time and manage arrivals with surgical precision.
feature3Description: Assign tables and communicate effectively with your staff during peak hours.
feature4Description: Secure your revenue with credit card hold and automatic confirmations.
blogSubtitle: News and updates about the platform
documentationSubtitle: Tutorials and guide to get started with the platform
faqSubtitle: Frequently asked questions about the platform
contactFaq: Have a question? Our team is here to help.
termsOfServiceContent: Our terms and conditions. By using our platform, you agree to be bound by these terms. These terms govern your access to and use of our services. Please read them carefully.
termsOfServicePresentationContent: The Tablely platform (hereinafter referred to as 'the Platform') is a service for connecting customers wishing to book a table (hereinafter referred to as 'the Customers') and restaurant establishments (hereinafter referred to as 'the Restaurateurs').
termsOfServiceAccessInscriptionContent: Access to the Platform is free for Customers. Registration requires the creation of an account via an email and password (managed via Supabase Auth). The user undertakes to provide accurate information and to maintain the confidentiality of their credentials.
termsOfServiceReservationServiceContent: Automatic Confirmation: Tablely allows a reservation to be made in real-time based on the inventory declared by the Restaurateur. Once the reservation is validated, the Customer receives a confirmation by email.
Customer Engagement: The Customer undertakes to arrive at the scheduled time. In case of an obstacle, the Customer must cancel their reservation via the platform as soon as possible.
termsOfServiceServiceNoShowPaymentConten: Banking Fingerprint: For certain establishments or groups, Tablely may require a banking fingerprint via its partner Stripe.
Cancellation Fees: The Restaurateur reserves the right to charge cancellation fees for no-shows if the specific cancellation conditions of the establishment are not met.
termsOfServiceResponsibilitiesContent: Of Tablely: The Platform acts as a technical intermediary. It cannot be held liable for the quality of the restaurant service, a refusal of welcome by the Restaurateur, or errors in manual inventory.
Of the restaurateur: The Restaurateur is solely responsible for updating their seat plan and honoring confirmed reservations.
termsOfServiceRGPDContent: Compliance with the RGPD: Tablely complies with the RGPD (General Data Protection Regulation) and ensures the protection of your personal data.
Your data is never resold to third parties.
The Restaurateur has access only to the data necessary to manage your reservation.
You have the right to access, rectify and delete your data.
termsOfServiceIPContent: All elements of the Platform (logos, interfaces, algorithms of placement) are the exclusive property of Tablely. Any reproduction is strictly prohibited.
termsOfServiceModificationTitle: 8. Modification of the terms of use
termsOfServiceModificationContent: Tablely reserves the right to modify the present CGU at any time. Users will be informed of any major modification by email or through a notification on the platform.
cookiePolicyDescription: Our cookie policy and how we use them
privacyPolicyDescription: Our privacy policy and how we use your data

footerDescription: Tablely helps restaurateurs take back control of their establishment with intuitive and powerful technology.
dualExperienceSubtitle: Tablely has been meticulously designed to meet the radically different needs of both guests and professionals.
clientExperienceDescription: A clean, soothing interface for friction-less table booking. Warm copper tones that invite gastronomic delight.
proExperienceDescription: A high-performance 'slate' dashboard for total service control. Dense, technical, and focused on operational efficiency.
step1Description: Import your floor plan and define your service hours in a few clicks.
step2Description: Integrate the booking module on your website and social networks.
step3Description: Receive your bookings and coordinate your team in real-time during service.
